About

Genesis Asset Solutions LLC is focused on helping clients recover unclaimed property through careful research, privacy-aware documentation handling, and a clear process.

We prioritize transparency, compliance, and client-controlled decision making. We will never represent ourselves as a government office.

Owner/Contact: Dustin Lee Jones

NAP: Genesis Asset Solutions LLC | 888-506-2708 | dustin@genesisassetsolutions.com
